summary: End-to-end testing of Fomerstick platform (auth, equipment, loans, smart-queue fairness, frontend). 17/17 pytest cases pass including the smart-queue equity test (lower-history user is activated ahead of an earlier-queued heavy user when the unit frees up). Frontend renders landing/login/register/equipment/dashboard/admin correctly, loan request flow works end-to-end (register -> request -> active loan in painel with Devolver button).

minor.issue: Fairness window uses ISO-string lexicographic comparison ($gte on requested_at string). Works fine while all timestamps stay in same offset format, but storing datetimes as ISO strings is fragile — consider storing as native BSON datetime for safer range queries.

When equipment is deleted, active loans remain pointing to a non-existent equipment_id (only queued loans are purged). Consider also cancelling/marking active loans, or refusing delete if any active loan exists.

After creating a queued doc with status='queued' and then immediately calling _try_activate_next, the same record may flip to active. This is correct behavior but a race could occur under concurrent requests because the read-then-update sequence is not atomic — acceptable for MVP but worth a comment.

issues: Premium dark/orange theme is consistent and high contrast. No issues observed.

action_items: (Optional) Decide policy for deleting equipment that still has active loans.

(Optional) Add data-testid attributes on key interactive elements (login email/password, submit, Solicitar agora, Devolver, Cancelar, Admin add/delete) to harden future automated tests — currently using text/role selectors which worked but are less robust.
(Optional) Persist dates as BSON datetime instead of ISO strings to make range queries robust across time zones.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 555-line file mixing models, routes, helpers, and seed logic. Acceptable for MVP but for growth split into routers/, models/, services/.
CORS allow_origins default '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject. Set explicit origins in production via CORS_ORIGINS env.
JWT_SECRET is committed in backend/.env. Fine for preview, but rotate before production.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@fomerstick.com / admin123 (seeded). Test user created via /api/auth/register during tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_-prefixed equipment and disposable users; ephemeral equipment is cleaned up via DELETE; users are left as-is (no delete endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_fomerstick.py covers auth, equipment CRUD, loan lifecycle (active/queued/return/cancel), admin protection, stats, and smart-queue fairness. Register route is /cadastro (not /registrar). Login stores token at localStorage key 'fs_token'. Equipment list is public; loan endpoints require Bearer. Smart-queue fairness verified: lower 30-day loan count wins regardless of FIFO order.
